claim_boundary: Tier 4.31c is local source/runtime host evidence only. It proves the custom C runtime owns the seven-EMA fixed-point temporal subset from Tier 4.31b with compact readback and behavior-backed shams. It is not EBRAINS hardware evidence, not speedup, not nonlinear recurrence, not native replay/sleep, not native macro eligibility, and not benchmark superiority.
